comment: Every pre-recorded narrator line in Moonfall. IDs are stable: the runtime composes sequences from them (e.g. dawn-death + reveal + role-werewolf). Regenerate audio with scripts/generate_voice_pack.py.

lines.preview: The village sleeps, and the tale continues.
lines.nightfall: Night falls on the village. Everyone, close your eyes.
lines.cue-role-reveal: The cards have been dealt. Each player may now learn their secret fate.
lines.cue-setup-thief: The Thief wakes, looks upon the two cards left untouched, and may exchange their destiny.
lines.cue-setup-cupid: Cupid wakes, and chooses two souls to bind together in love.
lines.cue-setup-lovers: The lovers wake, recognise one another, and fall back into blissful sleep.
lines.cue-night-seer: The Seer wakes, and chooses one player whose true identity they wish to know.
lines.cue-night-wolves: The Werewolves wake. They recognise one another, and silently choose a victim.
lines.cue-night-witch: The Witch wakes. Here is the victim chosen by the pack. Will fate be changed?
lines.cue-sheriff-vote: The village will now elect a Sheriff, whose vote shall carry the weight of two.
lines.cue-day-discussion: The village square is yours. Speak carefully. Truth and lies wear the same face.
lines.cue-day-vote: On my signal, cast your judgement. The accused will not see the tally until it is sealed.
lines.dawn-none: The sun rises, and the village wakes to a miracle. Nobody died in the night.
lines.dawn-death: The sun rises, and the village wakes to sorrow. The night has claimed its price.
lines.another-death: And fate is not yet finished. Another soul has fallen.
lines.vote-tied: The vote is tied. By the old law of the village, nobody is eliminated today.
lines.vote-none: No judgement was cast. Nobody leaves the village today.
lines.vote-death: The village has spoken. The condemned steps forward.
lines.win-village: The village prevails. The last Werewolf has fallen.
lines.win-wolves: The pack devours the dawn. No villager remains alive.
lines.win-lovers: Love conquers the moon. Two bound hearts are the last souls alive.
lines.win-none: The village falls silent. No soul survived the final chain of fate.
